given: Stock records are displayed in the table with quantity column visible
then: Quantity column values are right-aligned to make the table scannable and numbers easy to compare
architectural_notes: Pure presentation/styling concern owned entirely by the boundary/template (app/routes/ view): the quantity column carries a right-aligned style. No service, repository, or model involvement. E2E because the observable outcome is the rendered alignment in the UI; no cross-cutting concern beyond view styling.

independence.rationale: Specifies the visual alignment of quantity values for scannability, distinct from AC3 (column visibility and data); columns could be present but left-aligned without violating AC3.
